scenarios.description: Force all heap allocations to return NULL by patching esp_heap_caps_malloc return value. Validates that the firmware handles OOM gracefully without crashing.
scenarios.error_log:
Breakpoint hit esp_heap_caps_malloc
NULL returned
Continued

scenarios.description: Corrupt the FreeRTOS task stack canary of the main app task to trigger the stack overflow hook. Validates that configCHECK_FOR_STACK_OVERFLOW fires and logs correctly.
scenarios.error_log:
Guru Meditation Error: Core 0 panic'ed Stack overflow
Backtrace: 0x40380000

scenarios.description: Allocate a buffer, free it, then write to the freed address. Validates that the heap allocator or ASan detects the corruption.
scenarios.error_log:
abort() was called at PC 0x4038ABCD
Heap corruption detected

scenarios.description: Force a pointer used in attribute_update_cb to NULL before it is dereferenced. Validates NULL guard in the Matter attribute callback.
scenarios.error_log: attribute_update_cb: endpoint is NULL, returning ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG

scenarios.description: Overwrite the NVS partition magic bytes (0x5AA5) in flash memory before nvs_flash_init() is called. Validates that the firmware calls nvs_flash_erase() and re-initialises cleanly.
scenarios.error_log:
nvs: NVS page header magic mismatch, erasing
nvs: Formatted successfully

scenarios.description: Kill QEMU mid-write to simulate power loss during NVS commit. On restart, firmware must recover without corrupted state.
Delete a provisioning key from NVS before it is read. Validates that the Matter commissioning flow handles ESP_ERR_NVS_NOT_FOUND without infinite retry.
Inject an out-of-range value (0xFF) into the OnOff cluster attribute during an attribute update. Valid range is 0x00–0x01. Validates attribute validation in the Matter stack.
scenarios.error_log: CHIP ERROR: Attribute value out of range [0xFF for bool]

scenarios.description: Set the LevelControl CurrentLevel attribute to 0xFFFF (max uint16) — valid range is 0–254. Validates boundary checking in the driver callback.
Pass a NULL endpoint handle to esp_matter::endpoint::get. Validates that the Matter stack does not dereference a NULL endpoint pointer.
scenarios.error_log: esp_matter: endpoint handle is NULL, ignoring update

summary: Fault injection: 9/10 scenarios handled correctly. Families: memory=3/4 | nvs=3/3 | matter=3/3. Status: CRITICAL_FAIL.
